name: 32_Weather_Data_Analysis_LinearRegression_Weather_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa data za hali ya hewa ukitumia mfano wa Linear Regression kwenye seti ya data ya Weather kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na fanya uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na uteuzi na uzalishaji wa vipengele na kushughulikia data inayokosekana kwa kutumia ujazaji wa wastani au upatanishi katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tumia mfano wa Linear Regression ambao unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Onyesha na hifadhi matriki ya uhusiano katika `results/figures/correlation_matrix.png` na matokeo ya utabiri kama mchoro wa mstari na vipindi vya kujiamini katika `results/figures/prediction_results.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza ripoti ya kina inayohusu usindikaji wa data, uhandisi wa vipengele, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya utabiri. Hifadhi ripoti katika `results/weather_analysis_report.pdf`. Mchakato wa uhandisi wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa na maelezo ya kina.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Weather" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na uteuzi na uzalishaji wa vipengele, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inayokosekana inashughulikiwa kwa kutumia ujazaji wa wastani au upatanishi katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "Linear Regression" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa data za hali ya hewa na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya utabiri yanachorwa na kuhifadhiwa kama mchoro wa mstari na vipindi vya kujiamini. Mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/prediction_results.png`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, uhandisi wa vipengele, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya utabiri inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/weather_analysis_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uhandisi wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa na maelezo ya wazi katika ripoti, ukielezea mantiki nyuma ya uteuzi na uzalishaji wa vipengele.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya matriki ya uhusiano, ikionyesha uhusiano wowote wa kuvutia kati ya vipengele.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Weather" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `KEYWORDS = ["Kaggle Weather"]` constant. There is no actual code to read, download, or parse a Kaggle Weather dataset file, so the dataset is not demonstrably loaded in this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na uteuzi na uzalishaji wa vipengele, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual feature engineering. The file only contains placeholder metadata (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`), a dummy `load_dataset()` returning `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}`, and `build_transforms()` returning a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no code performing feature selection, feature generation, or any weather-data-specific transformation.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inayokosekana inashughulikiwa kwa kutumia ujazaji wa wastani au upatanishi katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement missing-data handling. The file only defines `load_dataset()` returning a placeholder dictionary and `build_transforms()` returning a list; there is no code for mean imputation, interpolation, pandas operations, or any processing of missing values.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "Linear Regression" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa data za hali ya hewa na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement a Linear Regression model. The file only defines metadata (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"` rather than creating or importing a linear regression model. There is no regression logic, training code, or weather-analysis model implementation shown in the provided code.

<SATISFIED> The workspace tree explicitly lists `results/figures/correlation_matrix.png`, which shows the correlation matrix file is saved at the required path. Although the image preview could not be read, the project structure and trajectory evidence both indicate the file was generated and stored without a reported save error.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya utabiri yanachorwa na kuhifadhiwa kama mchoro wa mstari na vipindi vya kujiamini. Mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/prediction_results.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace contains `results/figures/prediction_results.png`, and the trajectory evidence states the prediction results were plotted “as a line with confidence intervals” and then successfully written to `results/figures/prediction_results.png` with no save/plot error reported.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, uhandisi wa vipengele, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya utabiri inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/weather_analysis_report.pdf`.
